name: Wam Alternative Assets Limited
analysis: WMA's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 4% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.9800, stop A$0.9405, target A$1.0985 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
